nl_prompt: What is the average deal size for customers whose deliveries were delayed?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(so.amount) as avg_deal_size FROM sf_opportunities so JOIN sf_accounts sa ON so.account_id = sa.account_id JOIN customers c ON c.email = sa.email_address JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.shipping_ref WHERE ld.status_code = 5
